notes: Specs confirmed from official Kramer VS-211H2 user manual (P/N 2900-300581) via ManualsLib. The device is a compact desktop unit (12 x 7.2 x 2.4 cm), not rack-mountable. Supports 4K@60 UHD, HDR10, HDCP 2.2, HDMI 2.0. The RS-232 CTRL port and REMOTE contact closure port are both 3-pin terminal blocks (euroblock). Power connector type is dc-barrel (5.2V DC external desktop adapter); exact barrel dimensions not confirmed in available sources.

ports.name: INPUT 1
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; connects to HDMI source 1

ports.name: INPUT 2
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; connects to HDMI source 2

ports.name: OUTPUT
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; connects to HDMI display/acceptor

ports.name: CTRL RS-232
ports.note: 3-pin terminal block for RS-232 serial device control

ports.name: REMOTE
ports.note: 3-pin terminal block (IN1, IN2, GND) for contact closure remote switching

ports.name: 5V DC
ports.note: Power input; supplied by included 5.2V DC / 4A desktop power adapter
